location: Dropped by a Skeleton wielding it just past the entrance Site of Grace inside Tombsward Catacombs, behind a door sealed by an Imp Statue that requires a Stonesword Key; more copies can drop from Skeletons deeper in.
tactics: Reach Tombsward Catacombs by heading south from Church of Pilgrimage toward the Minor Erdtree, then finding the doorway hidden behind a stone pillar
The first Grossmesser-wielding Skeleton is right past the entrance grace, but a locked door there needs a Stonesword Key to open
Skeletons here reanimate after death unless finished with a follow-up strike or fire damage; the ~2% drop rate means repeat kills are likely
The same weapon also drops from Skeletons in several other catacombs/hero's graves (Liurnia, Caelid, Altus Plateau, Mt. Gelmir) if you want a different farm spot
lore: A broad-bladed curved sword built to put its own weight behind every cut. Once a wielder gets a feel for its particular heft, it becomes a dependable, no-frills weapon.

builds.name: Strength-leaning curved sword
builds.why: A slightly higher Strength requirement (14) than most curved swords, with even D/D scaling, lets it fit a Strength-forward quality build.
